text.title: Feature Flag Rollout and Targeting Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure applying the feature-flags-rollout-targeting methodology end-to-end. Each step lists inputs, action, output, and optional decision gate.

step.name: wire-bucketing
step.action: Add in_rollout(flag, user_id, percent) helper using sha256 hashing.

step.name: add-targeting-rules
step.action: Match attrs against flag.targeting; gate before rollout_percent check.

step.name: define-ramp-plan
step.action: Document the ramp steps + guardrail metrics + abort criteria.

step.name: execute-ramp
step.action: Bump percent step by step; wait observation_window between bumps; abort on guardrail breach.

step.name: lock-100-or-rollback
step.action: If all guardrails clean, lock at 100% and schedule flag cleanup; if breach, roll back.
step.decision-gate: Decision must reference the observation window data.
